value:
I understand how stressful that is—I'm sorry you're dealing with a stolen card. However, I'm not able to shut off or freeze your credit card directly, as that needs to go through your bank or credit card issuer. I'd recommend calling them right away to report the theft and request an immediate freeze or cancellation.

If you have any charges on your account with us that you'd like us to look into or dispute, please let me know your booking details and I'm happy to help with that side of things.
